TestCase z15Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_x = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_x, t1.x, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.x = follow_case_x;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive check: ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Determine sub‑array indices (deterministic choice)
    int start = follow_case.n / 4;
    int end   = (follow_case.n * 3) / 4;
    if (start < 0) start = 0;
    if (end >= follow_case.n) end = follow_case.n - 1;
    
    // Reverse subarray between start and end
    while (start < end) {
        double temp = follow_case.x[start];
        follow_case.x[start] = follow_case.x[end];
        follow_case.x[end] = temp;
        ++start;
        --end;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
